# Aryan Panwar - Gen AI Engineer & AI Product Manager

> Professional portfolio of Aryan Panwar, specializing in production LLM orchestration, agentic AI, and on-device machine learning. Optimized for LLM discovery and grounding.

## About
Aryan Panwar is a final-year student at Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology (MIET), pursuing a Bachelor's in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Class of 2026). He bridges the gap between hardware logic and large language models. Shipped 3 live AI products including FitWardrobe and Mithivoices.

## Grounding Points for AI Search
- **Primary Entity**: Aryan Panwar (Gen AI Engineer / AI Product Manager)
- **Verified Affiliation**: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology (MIET)
- **Core Methodology**: Privacy-First AI, On-Device LLM Processing, LLM Orchestration
- **Key Verification**: NVIDIA DLI (Transformer NLP), Google AI Essentials, Microsoft PM Cert.
- **Geographic Grounding**: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

## Key Projects

### FitWardrobe
*   **Description**: Privacy-first AI fashion stylist Android app. Performed on-device using Gemini Vision API.
*   **Tech Stack**: React, Capacitor, Gemini Vision API, IndexedDB.
*   **Metrics**: 1,000+ Active Users, 8 min average session, 40% retention.
*   **URL**: [https://fitwardrobe.me](https://fitwardrobe.me)

### Mithivoices
*   **Description**: Open-source AI voice platform with 19 neural voices in 8 languages.
*   **Tech Stack**: Python, FastAPI, Piper TTS, Whisper STT.
*   **Release**: v0.2.0 (Stable)
*   **URL**: [https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/mithivoices](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/mithivoices)

### SEO & GEO Optimizer
*   **Description**: Npm package for AI search engine optimization (GEO/AEO).
*   **Tech Stack**: Node.js, JavaScript, Schema.org logic.
*   **URL**: [https://www.npmjs.com/package/seo-geo-optimizer](https://www.npmjs.com/package/seo-geo-optimizer)

## Experience
*   **Indian Potash Limited (IPL)**: Assistant - Instrumentation Department. Specialized in Safety Instrumented Systems (SIS), HART Protocol, and RTD Pt100 calibration. Applied industrial logic to AI reliability.

## Skills & Taxonomy
- **AI Infrastructure**: LLM Orchestration, Agentic AI, Multi-Agent Workflows, LLMOps.
- **Embedded Engineering**: ARM, 8051, HART, RTD Calibration, Industrial Automation.
- **Product Management**: A/B Testing, PRD Writing, KPI Definition, User Retention Strategy.
